heroHeadline: US–Iran Talks Collapse; Sudan Marks 3 Years — Global Peace Architecture Under Acute Strain
heroSubtitle: Iran declares no plans for next round of nuclear negotiations as US naval blockade triggers backlash. Sudan's third war anniversary sees new US sanctions and a stalled peace roadmap. Ukraine talks exclude Kyiv. Colombia's ELN process frozen 15+ months. DRC–Rwanda Washington Accords stall. 10 ceasefires in force globally.
footerNote: Data sourced from UN, African Union, IGAD, Crisis Group, USIP, PA-X Database, and Tier 1–3 sources across all media poles.
